text.tspan: System architecture components with detailed descriptions.
for a complete overview of the system architecture.
Tables can have custom column widths specified as percentages using the
directive placed immediately after the table:
Detailed explanation of the feature or component
Handles Markdown syntax parsing with GFM extensions
Assembles the document structure and applies formatting
Example table with custom column width distribution.
In this example, the first column occupies 15% of the table width, the second column 25%, and the third
column (containing longer descriptions) occupies 60% of the available space.
